---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to mojo-redis
---

## Problem

What command or capability are you missing? (Note the out-of-scope list
in the README: TLS, DNS, timeouts/async, connection pooling, and RESP3
are deliberately deferred.)

## Proposed API

Sketch the method signature you'd expect to use.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you're using now (e.g. via the `execute` escape hatch),
or other approaches you considered.
